purpose: Freeze the app-owned Council v1 semantic model without claiming an executable consumer, cross-language parity, runtime behavior, independent review, or PM acceptance.

appOwned: Council round progression and Council-stage completion output

notOwned.workflowRouting: R-011 resolves Workflow-to-Council assignment and the Workflow family owns routing and hold selection.
notOwned.codexPrimitive: fkst-substrate owns Codex process execution; R-017 freezes the app/Codex responsibility boundary.
notOwned.reusableLoopSemantics: Public devloop owns admitted reusable loop invariants; R-017 maps the exact public surface.
notOwned.evidenceEnvelopeAndTransport: R-043 owns the shared app evidence envelope and immutable transport contract; this contract freezes only Council-specific bindings and invariants.
notOwned.runtimeOrchestration: R-023 implements the Council consumer; R-031 supplies executable seam proof.

policiesPerDefinition.basis: App-owned Step-0 tightening of a nonempty map so the v1 catalog cannot be unbounded; executable validation is R-010.

seatTimeoutSeconds.basis: The Council contract supplies a finite hard ceiling; R-043 must admit an equal or tighter compatibility cap before activation.

ordering.definitionSeats: CouncilDefinition.seats is ordered and seat ids are unique.
ordering.policyRoster: CouncilPolicy.roster is ordered, contains unique ids, and every id resolves to exactly one seat in the same definition.
ordering.roundContributions: CouncilRoundFact.contributions contains exactly one entry for every selected roster id, byte-for-byte in roster order, with the lens from the resolved seat.
ordering.dissent: CouncilRoundFact.dissent is the roster-order projection of completed contributions whose verdict is changesRequested.
ordering.lensVocabulary: The vocabulary order is stable for display and fixture enumeration only; a seat's selected lens, not enum position, determines its contribution lens.

contributionNormalization: A roster seat is invoked at most once in a new round.
A completed structured output emits executionStatus=completed and verdict approve, changesRequested, or abstain.
A timeout emits the seat exactly once with executionStatus=timeout and verdict=failed.
A missing, malformed, or other failed output emits the seat exactly once with executionStatus=failed and verdict=failed.
A missing invocation is explicit by the roster slot being present with failed/failed and null contributionDigest/codexRunRef; it is never represented by omitting the seat.
Evidence that is partial, duplicate, extra, reordered, or lens-mismatched is invalid and is never reduced into a decision.

decisionReducer.precondition: The definition, policy, roster resolution, contribution completeness/order/lenses, status-verdict pairs, and bounds are valid.
decisionReducer.precedenceInvariant: Approval rules are evaluated before changesRequested. Under simpleMajority, more than half of the full roster approving yields approved even when a minority has valid changesRequested verdicts; approved with nonempty dissent is valid and dissent still records those changes-requesting seats. Under unanimous, any non-approve prevents approval, so one or more valid changesRequested verdicts yield changesRequested when the full roster is not all approve.

orderedRules.when: agreement=unanimous and every full-roster contribution verdict=approve
no approval rule matched and at least one completed contribution verdict=changesRequested

decisionReducer.nonApprovalRule: abstain, failed, timeout, missing, and malformed output never count as approval; the simple-majority denominator is always the full configured roster.

mechanics.dissentReducer: For dissentRule=explicitChangesRequested, select seatId from completed changesRequested contributions in roster order. No model, prompt, score, or consensus result may reinterpret it.
mechanics.capInvariant: No round greater than maxRounds is invoked or emitted. Council emits only the stage outcome and optional exhaustion reason; Workflow routing, terminal selection, and assignment resolution are exclusively R-011/Workflow concerns.
mechanics.laterRoundBinding: A later round retains the same qualified entity, run, Workflow, Council, policy, stage, head, connection revision, app-package digest, and graph digest and includes the accepted prior structured round facts/excerpts. Any drift is invalid.
mechanics.replay: If the same accepted Council round identity and digest already exist, return the same accepted evidence and invoke zero seats. Conflicting evidence fails closed. Executable replay behavior is R-023/R-031.

connectionId.invariant: part of canonical qualified entity; immutable across rounds

githubHost.invariant: same host across run; no unqualified number authority

kind.invariant: entity kind cannot drift within chain

seatId.cardinality: exactly 1 required per selected roster seat
seatId.authority: app Council runtime evidence; AUTH-DATA L1220-L1230 and L1275-L1280

seatId.digest: included with contribution array order significant

lens.authority: resolved Council definition; AUTH-DATA L1220-L1230 and L1275-L1280

executionStatus.invariant: timeout or failed requires verdict=failed; completed forbids verdict=failed
executionStatus.evidence: PLANNED_UNVERIFIED Codex result/provenance mapped by R-017

verdict.invariant: status pair valid; no semantic score or free-text decision

contributionDigest.authority: R-023 bounded contribution canonicalization; AUTH-DATA L1225
contributionDigest.invariant: required for completed; null for missing; timeout/failure policy frozen by R-010
contributionDigest.digest: field value included even when null

codexRunRef.invariant: required for an invoked completed seat; null identifies a missing invocation only with failed/failed; never treated as Workflow authority
codexRunRef.digest: field value included even when null

excerpt.authority: R-023 bounded structured contribution projection; AUTH-DATA L1227
excerpt.invariant: display/context only; never mechanically scored; hostile markup remains text
excerpt.digest: field value included even when null

at.invariant: observation time only; does not order contributions or confer authority

schema.authority: app-owned Step-0 evidence subtype freeze; AUTH-DATA L1229 and L1233-L1235

CouncilRoundFact.wireKind: Council fact variant inside the shared AppEvidenceEnvelope

round.authority: R-023 Council round controller; AUTH-DATA L1132-L1137
round.invariant: starts at 1; increments by one only after below-cap inconclusive; never exceeds cap

inputHeadSha.invariant: equals outer headSha when nonnull and stays immutable across later rounds
inputHeadSha.evidence: PLANNED_UNVERIFIED qualified head plus envelope equality

contributions.cardinality: exactly 1 required; elements exactly roster length 1..5
contributions.authority: R-023 Council execution normalization; AUTH-DATA L1134 and L1275-L1280
contributions.invariant: exactly one ordered matching-lens entry per roster seat; no partial alternative
contributions.evidence: PLANNED_UNVERIFIED emitted fact and runtime proof

decision.invariant: byte-deterministic from valid full-roster contributions and agreement
decision.evidence: PLANNED_UNVERIFIED recomputed rather than trusted blindly

dissent.authority: app-owned mechanical dissent reducer; AUTH-DATA L691-L700
dissent.invariant: exact roster-order ids with completed changesRequested verdict; no other ids

stageComplete.invariant: true for approved/changesRequested and at-cap inconclusive; false only below-cap inconclusive

reasonCode.authority: app-owned Council exhaustion output; AUTH-DATA L702-L706
reasonCode.invariant: non-null exactly for at-cap inconclusive; Council does not choose a route or terminal

CouncilEnvelopeBinding.wireKind: required Council view of fields owned by fkst.devbored.evidence.v1/R-043

appPackageDigest.invariant: matches archived launch receipt and stays fixed across rounds

graphDigest.authority: launch graph provenance; AUTH-DATA L1104 and L1292-L1295
graphDigest.invariant: matches archived launch receipt; no consensus/reference package graph

connectionRevision.authority: accepted connection revision; AUTH-DATA L1105 and L1292-L1295
connectionRevision.invariant: matches archived launch and is immutable across rounds

entity.invariant: same qualified entity for chain and all rounds

runId.authority: R-043 envelope chain identity; AUTH-DATA L1107 and L1260-L1264
runId.invariant: partitions sequence with qualified entity; immutable across rounds

sequence.invariant: starts at 1 and is gap-free for accepted evidence

dedupKey.authority: R-043 deterministic evidence identity; AUTH-DATA L1109 and L1263-L1273

workflowId.invariant: inherited identity only; Council does not resolve assignment or route

workflowDigest.invariant: immutable across rounds; assignment/digest rules owned by R-011

councilVersion.invariant: equals selected definition version and stays fixed across rounds

councilDigest.invariant: equals R-010 canonical definition digest and stays fixed across rounds

policyId.invariant: resolves in selected definition; resolution ownership is R-011

stageId.invariant: Council treats as immutable context and owns no route

headSha.authority: qualified git/GitHub fact; AUTH-DATA L1118 and L1237-L1241
headSha.invariant: equals fact.inputHeadSha when both apply; cannot drift across rounds

previousDigest.authority: R-043 envelope chain; AUTH-DATA L1119 and L1260-L1264

emittedAt.authority: R-023 emitter via R-043 envelope; AUTH-DATA L1121
emittedAt.invariant: bounded evidence metadata; does not confer trust

digest.authority: R-043 canonical envelope digest; AUTH-DATA L1122 and L1260-L1261
digest.invariant: SHA-256 of frozen canonical envelope with digest field omitted

CouncilTransportBinding.wireKind: required Council view of TransportedAppEvidence fields owned by R-043

commentId.invariant: external metadata; not part of envelope digest

permalink.authority: qualified GitHub transport; AUTH-DATA L1160-L1168 and L1252-L1258
permalink.invariant: external metadata created after publish; never fabricated

authorLogin.invariant: must match admitted loop actor before parsing

createdAt.invariant: must equal updatedAt for v1 immutable comment

updatedAt.authority: qualified GitHub transport; AUTH-DATA L1160-L1168 and L1252-L1258
updatedAt.invariant: must equal createdAt; edited evidence fails closed

trust.type: literal trusted for admitted Council projection
trust.authority: trust-before-parse result; AUTH-DATA L1167 and L1282-L1290
trust.invariant: only trusted evidence may produce Council state; malformed/untrusted/conflict cannot advance
trust.digest: excluded from envelope digest; derived from transport and policy

digestSemantics.definition: All six CouncilDefinition fields and every nested CouncilSeat/CouncilPolicy field participate. Seat and roster array order is significant. Policy-map key canonicalization, UTF-8/key ordering/number rules, and canonical fixture digests are exclusively frozen and executed by R-010; no digest PASS is claimed here.
digestSemantics.roundFact: Every CouncilRoundFact and SeatEvidence field participates in the shared R-043 envelope digest, including explicit nulls required by the wire corpus. Contribution and dissent order is significant.
digestSemantics.provenance: CouncilEnvelopeBinding fields are digest-bound by the shared envelope except digest itself. CouncilTransportBinding is external transport metadata and is intentionally outside the canonical envelope digest.

proofObligations.mustProve: Exact JSON schema, unknown-key rejection, bounds, canonical bytes/digests, valid/invalid corpus, every decision/dissent case, ordered matching-lens completeness, explicit missing/timeout normalization, and Dart/Lua parity.

Workflow carries only councilId/policyId; Council/policy resolution, cross-connection rejection, stage compatibility, digest effects, and Workflow routing/exhaustion handling. Council owns no route or assignment decision.
Exact substrate Codex and public-devloop boundary, immutable lens-template selection, read-only sandbox, timeouts, result/provenance correlation, and zero consensus dependency/import.

Integrated app package consumes every editable field, normalizes exactly one contribution per roster seat, computes decisions/dissent/round progression, emits required provenance/evidence, and replays accepted rounds without reinvocation.

Bounded executable Council/Codex round under the admitted sandbox, decision and cap behavior, immutable read-back-confirmed evidence, hostile ordered-contribution rejection, replay zero-invocation, and no reference package loaded.

gaps.fact: No integrated app package or executable Council consumer exists.
The exact canonical JSON/digest corpus and Dart/Lua reducer parity do not exist.
Workflow assignment resolution and routing are deliberately outside this contract.
Public devloop source search found no Council/seat/lens/dissent API, and its visibility allowlist omits the app package identity. Source presence elsewhere is not manufactured capability.
Substrate exposes Codex spawn/status primitives, but safe current-CLI invocation and direct per-contribution run-reference correlation remain unproved.
Shared app evidence envelope, immutable comment carrier, and effect receipt are owned by downstream contracts and are not executable here.
Standing Fable advisory, independent Opus review, and main-PM acceptance have not occurred and are not claimed.
